steps.t: The Grimwood Lumber-yard is found in the heart of the Grimwood within Hithlad, south and east across the Hoardale River. Soldier Faltúrz ordered you t…
Soldier Faltúrz awaits your return at the Krahjarn-encampment at Gramsfoot. You scouted through the Grimwood and discovered the Grimwood Lumber-yard. …
